overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk alleyway. The player moves past a hotel entrance, through steam-filled corridors, and approaches a dead end with a seated figure and vertical signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk hotel entrance under concrete overpass

events.description: pedestrian in colorful jacket walks past from left to right crossing the alley
cardboard box and red couch exit the frame as camera moves past them

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway past a hotel entrance with neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a colorful red and green jacket walking across the path from left to right

entered.detail: large open cardboard box sitting in the immediate foreground on the asphalt
red upholstered sofa or couch discarded on the right sidewalk
bright pink neon sign spelling HOTEL mounted on the building facade
white steam or vapor rising from ground vents in the middle distance
large concrete overpass structure covering the alley overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley beneath a concrete overpass, dominated by a pink neon hotel sign. A cardboard box and red couch sit in the foreground while steam rises in the distance. A pedestrian in a colorful jacket crosses the path from left to right as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: steamy back alley with garbage accumulation and neon signage

events.description: steam vapor becomes denser and more prominent, filling the center of the alleyway
vertical karaoke neon sign becomes visible at the end of the alley, adding orange glow

agents.ego_description: continuing down the alley through patches of rising steam toward the dead end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the left wall, moving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large pile of black garbage bags and trash accumulated against the right wall
cyan neon sign with Japanese text and 24h indication on the left building
tall vertical orange neon sign with Japanese characters spelling karaoke
concrete wall covered in green and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the alley, the camera passes through denser patches of rising steam. The hotel sign disappears behind as piles of garbage bags appear on the right. A vertical karaoke neon sign becomes visible at the dead end ahead, casting an orange glow on the graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley dead end with vertical neon signage and resting figure

events.description: approaching the terminus of the alley where a person is seated on the ground
camera slows and stops near the seated individual at the alley dead end

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a seated individual at the end of the alley near the bright vertical neon sign

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the wet ground leaning against the wall near the karaoke sign, appearing injured or resting

entered.detail: large rusted metal barrel lying on its side in the middle of the alley
graffiti-covered wall with metal bars marking the terminus of the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the dead end of the alley, approaching a person sitting on the ground near a rusted barrel. The vertical karaoke neon sign dominates the right side of the frame, illuminating the graffiti-covered walls. Steam drifts in the background as the camera slows to focus on the seated figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow, neon-lit alleyway that transitions from a wide urban entrance to a claustrophobic dead end. It begins beneath a concrete overpass dominated by a pink hotel sign, moving past a red couch and a pedestrian in a colorful jacket. As the camera pushes deeper, the hotel sign fades and the environment becomes more cluttered with piles of garbage bags and denser patches of rising steam. The scene then shifts toward a warm orange glow as a vertical karaoke sign emerges ahead, casting light across graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera slows to a halt at the end of the alley, focusing on a person sitting on the ground near a rusted barrel amidst drifting steam.
